I was sitting at my desk when there was a loud crash as something came flying through the window. At first I thought it was a rock, but then I realized it was a cricket ball. I picked up the ball and put it on the desk beside ___. Two young boys appeared outside the broken window. Not until you pay for this broken window.” They looked at me, then at each other, and then they both started running.
